# pai end

> Finalize a session: save state, mark note Completed, display safe-exit instructions.

## Synopsis

```
pai end [options]
```

## Options

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--dry-run` | Preview all changes without writing them |  |
